title: StartupDelayedCommand
description: The StartupDelayedCommand plugin allows server to execute a series of commands after a configurable delay when the server starts. The delay and commands are specified in a config.yml file
body:
# StartupDelayedCommand Plugin

**Description:**
The StartupDelayedCommand plugin for Spigot 1.20 allows server administrators to execute a series of commands after a configurable delay when the server starts. The delay and commands are specified in a `config.yml` file, providing flexibility and customization to automate tasks and enhance server management.

**Features:**
- Execute multiple commands at server startup.
- Configurable delay before execution.
- Easy-to-edit configuration file (`config.yml`).

**Command:**
- /sdc reload | Reload the config

**Permission:**
- startupdelayedcommand.reload | Allows the user to reload the plugin configuration
